_meta: Drug brand<->generic KNOWLEDGE BASE (public general-knowledge facts). This is a deterministic LOOKUP, NOT model generalization: it RESOLVES arbitrary brand synonyms (Advil<->ibuprofen) the morphological model provably cannot. Unlike the trained-model held-out split, this table legitimately INCLUDES the eval drugs -- it is a curated reference, like the refdata given-name/business-alias tables. RESULTS must label any eval lift from this table as lookup-driven, not learned.
